judgment.summary: Salesforce offers a compelling mix of high margins and strong cash flow at a discounted valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 3.81 beat the 3.05 estimate by 24.9%, with the next earnings date on 2026-05-27.
positives: Forward P/E of 11.63 and PEG ratio of 0.94 suggest the stock is priced attractively relative to growth.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $16.37B highlights significant cash generation power.
Gross margin of 77.7% reflects very strong core profitability.
Consensus analyst rating is a buy with a mean target of $268.05.
negatives: Current ratio of 0.76 and quick ratio of 0.64 suggest potential liquidity pressure.
Analyst growth estimate for the current FY is decelerating to 5.3%.
Total debt of $17.71B outweighs the $9.56B in total cash.

news.paragraph: Salesforce shares are experiencing recent downward pressure, even as the company continues to integrate agentic AI into its core workflows. While the stock is currently facing selling pressure, there are no specific upcoming earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the recent headlines.
